# Learned Patterns — Auto-Generated from Real Sessions

> This file is written automatically by Cursor at the end of every session.
> It grows with every project. Never edit manually — let the system write it.
> Cursor reads this at the START of every session before touching any code.

---

## HOW THIS FILE WORKS

Every time Cursor makes a mistake and you correct it → that pattern is captured here.
Every time a fix works perfectly → that pattern is reinforced here.
After 3 occurrences of the same pattern → it gets promoted to a permanent rule automatically.

Format:
- `[MISTAKE]` — something Cursor got wrong
- `[PATTERN]` — something that works consistently
- `[COUNT: N]` — how many times this has been seen
- `[PROMOTED]` — moved to permanent rules (rocket-error-fixes.mdc)

---
